RYAN STEVENS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. SANCTIONS IS IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, STANLEY GOFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 1/13/22. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE OR COUNSEL MAY FILE A DECLARATION AND WILL BE HEARD AT THE OSC HEARING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 504 VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL NO LATER THAN 4:30PM TODAY. THE COURTROOOM'S TELEPHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO GIVEN TO THE PARTIES. Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Stan Goff, Esq. (415.571.9570; scraiggoff@aol.com) for Plaintiff.
James Hannawalt, Esq. (415.554.3975; James.Hannawalt@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories - Set One And Request For Production Of Documents:

No opposition filed; motion granted. Responses without objections shall be served by October 22, 2021.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories - Set One And Request For Production Of Documents

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories - Set One And Request For Production Of Documents.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is continued on the court's own motion to September 27, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. Recusal by Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
